titleZh: 上市公司股东减持股份管理暂行办法
titleEn: Interim Measures for the Administration of Share Reductions by Shareholders of Listed Companies
issuingBodyZh: 中国证券监督管理委员会
summaryZh: 以规章形式重构上市公司减持规则体系，严格规范控股股东、实际控制人和董监高减持，并强化预披露、窗口限制和违规责任。
summaryEn: Recasts the listed-company share-reduction regime at the rule level, tightening controls on controlling shareholders, actual controllers, and senior management while strengthening pre-disclosure, timing restrictions, and liability.
